nodes.html: We propose a prompt-based approach to knowledge graph completion that outperforms existing embedding methods by 15% on standard benchmarks while requiring significantly less training data and computational resources.

nodes.html: A self-supervised framework for detecting anomalies in multivariate time series data without labeled examples, using contrastive learning to capture temporal dependencies and identify out-of-distribution patterns.
